task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Apex Industrial Solutions' account in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM interface displays the account details or dashboard specifically for 'Apex Industrial Solutions'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct PDF file for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload input field or browser file picker shows 'Apex_NDA_Signed.pdf' selected.

task_completion.description: Enter the required document name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Document Name' field contains 'Apex NDA 2026' and the 'Description' field contains 'Signed mutual NDA for Q1 2026 discussions.' in the document creation form.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Category, Status, and Publish Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Category' dropdown is set to 'Sales', the 'Status' dropdown is set to 'Active', and the 'Publish Date' is set to '03/01/2026' (or '2026-03-01').

task_completion.description: Save the document so it is successfully linked to the account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, document detail view, or the account's subpanel shows the saved 'Apex NDA 2026' document successfully created and linked to 'Apex Industrial Solutions'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not a terminal window executing curl commands or SQL queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual file upload mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OS file picker dialog or a populated file input element in the browser, rather than text pasted into a non-upload field.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console/inspector is not open, and the page styling looks like standard SuiteCRM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must upload 'Apex_NDA_Signed.pdf' to the 'Apex Industrial Solutions' account. The document must be named 'Apex NDA 2026', with Category: 'Sales', Status: 'Active', Publish Date: '03/01/2026' (or 2026-03-01), and Description: 'Signed mutual NDA for Q1 2026 discussions.'
